A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly filtered by package license rather than project license—seen in query_db call function-call-9358634597367205821 selecting from packageinfo with Licenses LIKE '%MIT%' and never filtering project_info Licenses—so its execute_python aggregation (function-call-12495425520773648543) included lodash/lodash instead of sveltejs/svelte, leading to a mismatch with the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After loading all project_info and extracting MIT projects, the agent used a brittle regex in execute_python (function-call-3185257177586173898) that only matched names followed by “on GitHub|is hosted|currently,” missing entries like “react-native-elements/react-native-elements is a GitHub repository,” which caused it to exclude that top-fork project and return the wrong top 5.
